baseCurrency.title: Base currency

baseCurrency.saveError: Couldn’t save your base currency. Please try again.

newPortfolioDefaults.title: Defaults for new portfolios
newPortfolioDefaults.subtitle: What a newly-created portfolio inherits. Existing portfolios keep tracking these unless you override them individually.

tax.hint: Applied to new portfolios and to any portfolio that hasn’t set its own. Override or reset it per portfolio on that portfolio’s tax report.

taxes.title: Taxes
taxes.subtitle: How BetterTrack records tax on your sells and dividends.
taxes.saveError: Couldn’t save your tax mode. Please try again.

none.label: No tax tracking
none.description: Record sells and dividends without any tax. This is the default.

manual_per_trade.label: Manual — enter tax per trade
manual_per_trade.description: You enter the tax yourself on each sell — an amount, or a percentage of the gain. Nothing is calculated for you.

country_specific.label: Austria (KESt)
country_specific.description: 27.5 % KESt on realized gains and dividends, with a moving-average cost basis. A loss in the same calendar year offsets earlier gains and refunds the tax already withheld. Everything resets on 1 January — no losses carry into the next year.

country_specific_de.label: Germany (Abgeltungsteuer)
country_specific_de.description: 25 % flat tax plus a 5.5 % solidarity surcharge on the tax, with FIFO cost basis per lot. A €1,000 saver's allowance (Sparer-Pauschbetrag) comes off each year first. Losses from selling shares only offset share gains, other losses offset all capital income — and unused losses carry forward into later years.

country_specific_fi.label: Finland (capital income tax)
country_specific_fi.description: 30 % capital-income tax on gains and dividends up to €30,000 per year, 34 % above, with FIFO cost basis. A loss in the same calendar year offsets gains and refunds tax already withheld — nothing carries into the next year. The €30,000 bracket applies per portfolio, not across all your accounts combined.

custom.label: Custom rules
custom.description: Build your own tax system: a flat rate plus switches for loss offset, refunds, the year reset, loss carry-forward, and the cost basis.

custom.rateInfo: Applied to the positive taxable pool of realized gains and dividends.
custom.costBasisInfo: How sell gains are computed: a moving average across all buys, or FIFO — the oldest lot sells first.
custom.lossOffsetInfo: A realized loss shrinks the taxable pool. Off: losses are ignored entirely.
custom.refundInfo: When the pool shrinks below what you already paid, the difference is refunded. Off: losses never refund — though editing or deleting recorded trades still corrects tax both ways.
custom.yearResetInfo: Each calendar year is taxed on its own. Off: one pool accumulates across the years.
custom.carryForwardInfo: A year-end net loss carries into later years instead of being forfeited.

manualDefault.title: Default tax entry
manualDefault.info: Prefilled into every sell and dividend, still editable per trade. Leave blank for no default.
manualDefault.invalid: Enter a valid amount, or a rate between 0 and 100 %.

password.title: Change password

sharingMoved.title: Portfolio sharing

modeNotice.cash: Full requested window — {{entries}}: a late constituent’s share sits as uninvested cash (0 % return) until its listing day.
modeNotice.redistribute: Full requested window — {{entries}}: a late constituent’s share is split equally among the already-listed constituents, then rebalanced to the target weights on its listing day.

backtest.rebalanceNotice: Rebalanced {{frequency}} to the target weights — {{count}} rebalances in this window.

dialog.repeatOffHint: One-shot — fires once, then pauses until you re-arm it.

warning.headline: This cannot be undone. Deleting your account removes:
warning.data: All portfolios, transactions, cash sources, custom assets, tax records and reports
warning.social: Your friendships, shared items, watchlists, conglomerates, alerts and notifications

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: Self-hosted metrics dashboards (Prometheus + Grafana) and how they are reached.
monitoring.loadError: Could not load the monitoring status.
monitoring.prometheusNote: Prometheus is never exposed directly — Grafana reads it internally.

access.title: External access
access.description: How the dashboards are reached from outside the LAN. Only ever through an authenticated path — never a raw-public endpoint.
access.needsDeploy: External access needs the deploy to opt in (BT_OBS_EXTERNAL_ACCESS) and a Grafana admin password (BT_GRAFANA_ADMIN_PASSWORD). Until both are set, the dashboards stay localhost/LAN-only.

embed.hidden: Grafana is reachable over localhost/LAN only. Enable external access to embed it here.

security.title: Security
security.subtitle: Manage two-factor authentication for your administrator account.
security.statusDescription: Two-factor authentication is required for every administrator account.

sessionPolicy.cardDescription: Admin sessions expire early — sign in with 2FA, then work without repeated prompts. This is independent of the app's user sessions.
sessionPolicy.hint: Choose between {{min}} and {{max}} hours. Changes apply on your next request.
sessionPolicy.rangeError: Enter a whole number of hours between {{min}} and {{max}}.

challenge.title: Two-factor authentication
challenge.promptTotpAndEmail: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app, or request an emailed code below.
challenge.promptTotpOnly: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.
challenge.promptEmailOnly: Enter the 6-digit code we emailed you.
challenge.recoveryPrompt: Enter one of your recovery codes.
challenge.emailCodeSent: If email is configured, a sign-in code is on its way. Enter it below.
challenge.emailCodeFailed: Could not send an email code. Try your authenticator or a recovery code.
challenge.useAuthenticatorOrEmail: Use an authenticator or email code
challenge.invalidCode: That code is incorrect or has expired.
challenge.sessionExpired: Your verification session expired. Please sign in again.
challenge.tooManyCodes: Too many incorrect codes. Please wait a moment and try again.

setup.title: Set up two-factor authentication
setup.intro: Two-factor authentication is required for administrator accounts. Set up at least one method to continue.
setup.chooseMethod: Choose how you'll provide your second factor.
setup.finishError: Couldn't open the console. Please try again.

totp.cardDescription: Codes from Google Authenticator, 1Password, or any TOTP app.

totp.manualEntryToggle: Can't scan? Enter this key manually

totp.disableToReenroll: Enter a current code to turn off the authenticator, then set it up again.
totp.disableCodeLabel: Current authenticator code or recovery code

email.cardDescription: A one-time code sent to a dedicated two-factor email address at sign-in.
email.proofLabel: Current authenticator code or recovery code
email.proofHint: Changing the address requires a current second factor.
email.confirmInstructions: We sent a code to {{email}}. Enter it to enable email codes.
email.codeHint: Enter the 6-digit code we just sent.

recoveryCodes.saveNotice: Save these recovery codes somewhere safe. Each one can be used once to sign in if you lose access to your other factors — they won't be shown again.
recoveryCodes.cardDescription: One-time codes to sign in if you lose access to your other factors.

queues.unavailable: No queue registry in this process
